mapper.select: SELECT id, theme_name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM kg_theme ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kg_theme(theme_name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{themeName}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE kg_theme SET theme_name = #{themeName}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.theme_name AS name FROM kg_resource_theme rt INNER JOIN kg_theme t ON t.id = rt.theme_id WHERE rt.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY t.id
